description: Green backpack with stitched and woven details, has embroidered branding on the frontOne haul loop on the back, has two adjustable and padded shoulder straps with branding on oneOne main zip compartmentOne external zip pocket on the frontA mesh stash pocket on one side, elasticated on the mouthEco-friendly, PVC-free, recylableWarranty: 5 years warranty against manufacturing defects
